verified_behavior: A document can upload a new cover or select one from the existing file library.
The upload path computes a checksum, reuses exact duplicates, records metadata, and stores the returned URL on the document.
The Files page and storage model present a cumulative 25 MB user quota.
contradiction: Product documents describe a 25 MB hard cap or per-file cap, storage code models a cumulative per-user quota, and the upload client passes no user ID into the server-side quota gate.
repo_cannot_answer: Whether the intended contract is per-file, cumulative per-user, both, or temporarily unenforced.
decision: Choose the intended storage contract, pass authenticated identity into enforcement, add boundary and analytics coverage, then update product documents and UI together.
